category_sources: source_facts.description says Swiss Java Knife; official GitHub README says SJK is a command-line tool for JVM diagnostic, troubleshooting, and profiling.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description expands the package as Swiss Java Knife; official GitHub README title is Swiss Java Knife (SJK).
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains usage and links to full command reference; official GitHub repository exposes a wiki.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to https://github.com/aragozin/jvm-tools; official GitHub page identifies aragozin/jvm-tools and contains sjk modules.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists sjk; official GitHub README describes JVM diagnostic, troubleshooting, profiling, JMX, attach, and perf counter use.
